summary: Distribution Loop Phase 2 VERIFIED. All new public APIs and UI pages working correctly. Landing page shows real stats (32 creators, 94 videos, 192 AI scenes, 357 total creations). Explore page with tabs (Trending/Newest/Most Remixed) working. Public creation pages (/v/{slug}) displaying titles, views, remix counts, creator info. Navigation between Landing→Explore→Public Creation flows correctly.

issues: Scene viewer shows placeholder icon when no scenes exist (expected for showcase data)

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Public APIs return real database data (not mocked)
Explore pagination with skip/limit working correctly
seed_data_creation: Showcase data with 94 videos already seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Distribution Loop Phase 2 verified. Landing page, Explore page (/explore), and Public Creation page (/v/{slug}) all working. Public APIs: /api/public/stats returns real numbers (32 creators, 94 videos, etc), /api/public/explore returns trending/newest/most_remixed feeds with pagination, /api/public/creation/{slug} returns creation details and increments views. Dashboard has Story Video as hero tool with 8 additional tools in collapsible 'More Tools' section. All key data-testids verified.

landing_page.details: Hero prompt box, social proof (real data: 94+ videos, 32 creators, 192+ AI scenes, 357+ total creations), three pillars (Create/Remix/Publish), How It Works, Trending section (6 cards), Remix CTA, Final CTA, Footer

explore_page.details: Tabs (Trending/Newest/Most Remixed) switch correctly and update URL params. Grid shows 12 creation cards per page. Cards show thumbnail, title, views, remix count. Total shows 94 creations.

public_creation_page.details: Title, views, remix count, creator info displayed. Scene viewer present. Remix buttons (header + sidebar + CTA section). Share button. Story text available for remix.

dashboard.details: Story Video as hero tool card with 'Create Video' button. 8 tools in collapsed 'More Tools' section. Universal prompt box with suggestion chips. Prompt routing works (typing 'video' shows Story Video Studio).

backend_apis.details: /api/public/stats (real numbers), /api/public/explore (3 tabs with pagination), /api/public/creation/{slug} (view tracking, creator info, story_text)

tests_executed: Landing page loads with all 7 sections (Hero, Social Proof, Three Pillars, How It Works, Trending, Remix CTA, Final CTA, Footer)
Social proof shows real numbers from /api/public/stats (32 creators, 94 videos)
Explore page loads with 3 tabs (Trending/Newest/Most Remixed)
Tab switching updates URL and fetches correct data
Explore grid shows 12 creation cards with thumbnails, titles, views, remix counts
Public creation page loads with title, views, remix count, creator
Remix and Share buttons present on public creation page
Dashboard loads with Story Video hero card
More Tools section shows 8 additional tools
Prompt box with suggestion chips works
Prompt routing shows suggestions when typing
